headline: Jim Cramer Analyzes Generac Holdings Ahead Of Wednesday Analyst Meeting
summary: Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE:GNRC) is one of the stocks in the recent Mad Money recap of everything Jim Cramer said about his upcoming game plan. Cramer discussed the stock in light of the datacenter business, as he remarked: Generac has an analyst meeting on Wednesday, and while its core business of backup generators matters, we […]
